step.title: Generate domain layer goals (one per BC)
step.rule: Step 2 must have completed successfully (goal-002 created) before this step executes.
Exactly one goal per BC. phase=domain. depends_on=[goal-002]. Goal IDs are sequential starting from goal-003.
All inputs read from docs/architecture/* files and templates on disk — never from conversation context (G-16).

substep.title: Resolve BC list
substep.action: Reuse BC_LIST from Step 0 (already validated — the level-3 headings under "## Bounded Context Inventory" in docs/architecture/bounded-contexts.md). If unavailable, re-read it from disk (G-16). No domain-model/context-mapping detail extraction, template resolution, or Share-ownership tracking is needed at roadmap time — those fed concrete fields the elaborator now authors against the real tree.

substep.title: Iterate BCs and emit domain goal skeletons
substep.action: For each BC in BC_LIST (order from bounded-contexts.md):
Maintain a running GOAL_INDEX starting at 3 (goal-003 is the first domain goal).

per-bc.action: Set DOMAIN_AREA = contexts/{{BC}}/src/Domain/ — the Domain layer directory for this BC in the resolved monorepo topology. COARSE deliverable path (depinfer seed + elaborator tree-read anchor), NOT a glob, NOT a per-file path. (Shared-kernel types this BC may own under contexts/previo/ are re-derived at elaboration against the real tree — the roadmap commits only to the BC's own Domain dir.)
Call the goal-create MCP tool with a roadmap SKELETON:

params.param: Implement {{BC}} domain: aggregates, VOs, events, repo interfaces (≤120 chars — truncate aggregate list if needed)

per-bc.rule: Description must be ≤120 chars. If BC name + aggregate list exceeds limit, use "Implement {{BC}} domain layer: {{N}} aggregates, VOs, events, interfaces".
max_retries=3 — domain goals have focused scope within a single BC.

NO acceptance/validate/scope/context/investigation_config/not_in_scope params and NO goal.md — roadmap skeleton; /tmux:elaborate authors every concrete field (PD-01..PD-26, fan-out, Share ownership, triad conditionals against the REAL tree) at dispatch (design §5/§6). NEVER run `tmux-cli rules match` here.

check.action: Print error with full context. Continue to next BC (do not abort entire step for one BC failure).
Print: "Domain skeleton created: goal-{{GOAL_INDEX:03d}} (phase=domain, status=roadmap, BC={{BC}}, depends_on=[goal-002], deliverable_area={{DOMAIN_AREA}})"

substep.title: Report domain goal generation results
substep.action: After all BCs processed, print summary:

check.action: Print warning: "{{bc_count - domain_goal_count}} BC(s) failed goal creation — review errors above."
